_source_note: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE DATA for demo/testing only. In production this content is written and reviewed by agricultural extension and financial-literacy partners before publication.

records.message_en: Hello, I am Taura. I can help with crop and livestock prices, weather and flood alerts, or basic savings and loan information. What would you like to know?
records.message_sn: Mhoro, ndini Taura. Ndinogona kubatsira nemitengo yezviyo nemombe, nyaya dzemamiriro ekunze nemvura zhinji, kana ruzivo rwekuchengetedza mari nemakwereti. Ungada kuziva chii?
records.message_nd: Sawubona, ngingu Taura. Ngingakusiza ngamanani ezitshalo lezifuyo, izexwayiso zesimo sezulu lezikhukhula, kumbe ulwazi lokonga imali lezikwelede. Ungathanda ukwazi ini?

records.message_en: This needs a person to help you properly. I am connecting you to a Taura support agent who will call or message you shortly.
records.message_sn: Izvi zvinoda munhu kuti akubatsire zvakanaka. Ndiri kukubatanidza nemubatsiri weTaura achakufonera kana kukutumira meseji nekukurumidza.
records.message_nd: Lokhu kudinga umuntu ukusize kahle. Ngikuxhumanisa lomsizi we-Taura ozakufonela kumbe akuthumele umlayezo masinyane.

records.message_en: Before we start: Taura will save a short record of this conversation (what you asked and the answer given) so we can improve the service and keep a safety record. Do you agree? Reply YES to continue or NO to stop.
records.message_sn: Tisati tatanga: Taura ichachengetedza chidimbu chidiki chehurukuro ino (zvawabvunza nemhinduro yakapiwa) kuti tigone kuvandudza sevhisi uye kuchengeta zvakachengeteka. Unobvuma here? Pindura HONGU kuenderera mberi kana KWETE kumira.
records.message_nd: Singakaqali: uTaura uzagcina umbiko omfitshane walesisikhulumo (lokho okubuzileyo lempendulo enikwe) ukuze sikwazi ukuthuthukisa isevisi njalo sigcine irekhodi lokuphepha. Uyavuma yini? Phendula YEBO ukuqhubeka kumbe HATSHI ukumisa.
